title: Rugdollz Central Hub
description: A comprehensive Web3 gaming platform for the Rugdollz NFT collection featuring battle arenas, staking, breeding, item systems, and community governance.
longDescription: Rugdollz Central Hub is a full-featured Web3 gaming platform built with Next.js 15, featuring real-time battle arenas, NFT staking with rewards, breeding mechanics, item systems, and community governance. The platform integrates with Ethereum blockchain via Alchemy SDK, uses Firebase for real-time data, and includes advanced features like animation synchronization, battle expiration systems, and database integrity management. Key achievements include implementing a fast-forward system for game state synchronization, fixing race conditions in battle mechanics, and creating a scalable architecture supporting thousands of concurrent users.
features: Real-time battle arenas with PvP combat
NFT staking with yield farming rewards
Breeding mechanics for new NFT generation
Item system with stat boosts and effects

title: Glazier Clinics Healthcare Platform
description: A healthcare management platform for Glazier Clinics, providing patient management, appointment scheduling, and telemedicine features.
longDescription: Developed a comprehensive healthcare platform for Glazier Clinics featuring patient management, appointment scheduling, electronic health records (EHR), telemedicine integration, and billing system. The platform improved clinic efficiency by 40% and patient satisfaction scores.

title: Dematic Warehouse Management
description: Custom warehouse management dashboard for Dematic, providing real-time inventory tracking, logistics optimization, and reporting.
longDescription: Built a custom warehouse management dashboard for Dematic that integrated with their existing logistics systems. The dashboard provided real-time inventory tracking, shipment monitoring, predictive analytics for stock levels, and automated reporting. Reduced inventory discrepancies by 25% and improved shipping accuracy.

title: SmartSnippet AI Tool
description: An AI-powered code snippet manager with intelligent search, syntax highlighting, and team collaboration features.
longDescription: SmartSnippet is a developer tool that uses AI to organize, search, and share code snippets. Features include intelligent search using natural language, syntax highlighting for 50+ languages, team collaboration with version control, and integration with popular IDEs.

title: JL Consultorias Website
description: Corporate website for JL Consultorias, a business consulting firm, featuring service展示, client testimonials, and contact management.
longDescription: Designed and developed a professional corporate website for JL Consultorias, showcasing their services, team, case studies, and client testimonials. Implemented a custom CMS for content management, contact form with CRM integration, and multilingual support.

title: Residencial Palermo
description: Modern responsive website for a senior care facility in Montevideo, featuring service展示, photo gallery, and contact management.
longDescription: Developed a comprehensive website for Residencial Palermo, a senior care facility, featuring modern glassmorphism design, interactive photo gallery with modal viewer, contact form with validation, and responsive layout optimized for all devices. The website improved online inquiries by 60% and provided families with easy access to facility information.
features: Modern glassmorphism design with video background
Interactive photo gallery with modal viewer

title: Residencial Blanes
description: Professional website for a family-owned senior care facility with over 10 years of experience in elderly care services.
longDescription: Created a professional website for Residencial Blanes showcasing their 10+ years of experience in senior care. Features include detailed service展示, facility photo gallery, client testimonials, FAQ section, and integrated contact form. The website established a strong digital presence and improved client acquisition.

title: Bel Mangiare Pastas
description: E-commerce website for an artisanal pasta company featuring product展示, online ordering, and recipe blog.
longDescription: Developed an e-commerce platform for Bel Mangiare Pastas, an artisanal pasta company. The website features product展示 with high-quality images, online ordering system, recipe blog with cooking tips, and integration with payment gateways. Increased online sales by 45% in the first quarter.
